subject: Mozi Minute: Mozi Minute: 70% Calendar Rule of Thumb
body:
Words I like: You can't beat someone who has already decided.

Here's a useful heuristic for sales team management:

The sweet spot for calendar utilization is about 70%.

If reps are at 100% calendar utilization, conversion rates drop because they don't have time to prepare, and they get burnt out.

If reps are at 30% calendar utilization, they get the "commission breath" (panicked selling) and aren't paced for success.

70% is the sweet spot.

Here's the math:

5 reps at 100% calendar utilization closing at 20% = 100 deals
7 reps at 70% calendar utilization closing at 30% = 147 deals

The second team closes 47% more deals with better quality conversations and happier reps.

You're welcome.
